questions.text: The polynomial p(x) = x³ − 6x² + 11x − 6 has a factor of (x − 1). What are the other factors?
questions.explanation: Dividing p(x) by (x−1) gives x²−5x+6, which factors as (x−2)(x−3). So the roots are x=1, x=2, x=3.

questions.text: What is the derivative of f(x) = x²·sin(x)?
questions.explanation: Using the product rule: f'(x) = 2x·sin(x) + x²·cos(x). Differentiate each factor separately, then add.

questions.text: A geometric series has first term 3 and common ratio 0.5. What is the sum to infinity?
questions.explanation: S∞ = a/(1−r) = 3/(1−0.5) = 3/0.5 = 6. This works because |r| < 1, so the series converges.
